subcodes.first_line: Dost thou perceive that which hath passed, and find that which hath faded away? I know not why mankind grieveth not. Take ye heed, O ye who are endued with understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل تری ما عبر و هل تجد ما غبر لم ادر لم یحزن البشر فاعتبروا یا اولی الالباب
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God
